calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-02-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-07-2026 Continued To Jun-02-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rob Coleman for executor Phoebe James, who was also present (via Zoom).
Stephanie Presber James, mother of Phoebe James (via Zoom).

The matter was called for status on close of estate.

Mr. Coleman reported that the estate involves issues relating to a related matter in San Mateo County and assets in Brazil, and that administration remains ongoing. He stated that Brazilian counsel has been retained and that additional assets may become available to the estate depending on resolution of those matters.

The Court noted that a recent filing had not yet been processed or reflected on the docket and therefore had not been reviewed.

The matter was continued to June 2, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-27-2026 Continued To Apr-07-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rob Coleman appeared via zoom for and with Phoebe James (petitioner).

Mr. Coleman stated that Mr. Barlow was caught in a snowstorm in the Midwest, that He is requesting a short continuance, that it's a complicated estate decedent passed away in Brazil where he had many businesses, and that they are in litigation at the Brazilian courts currently. The matter is continued to April 7, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge:Cindee Mayfield. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Musto. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
E. Garrett Barlow for Phoebe James, Petitioner/Proposed Executor (via Zoom).

The court inquired as to how San Francisco County is the appropriate venue for this action. Mr. Barlow explained that decedent grew up in San Francisco and lived in the Bay Area for most of his life. Personal belongings were stored in a San Francisco storage unit. Decedent's estate includes an interest in multiple trusts, including the estate of his father, George James, which is under San Francisco jurisdiction [case number PTR-22-305636].

The court confirmed that minors received direct notice of the petition and advised that future notices be filed as freestanding documents rather than attached to declarations.

The court inquired as to whether there were any objections to admitting the will. No objections were raised. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 5, 2020, is admitted to probate. Phoebe James is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for January 27, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
